messages.content: [redacted]
How can I help you?
Hi there. We are a small charity organization. We help poor communities with food and medicine. Can we please talk about this?
Hello. Yes, we are online. Ransom demand is $85k in Bitcoin. We have all your donor lists and sensitive files.
$85k? That's completely impossible for us. We are a non-profit with a very limited budget.
We understand it's a charity. But we took real risk to get in. Payment or we start leaking data soon.
Leaking would hurt our donors badly. It would also harm the vulnerable people we support every day. Please think about that.
Ok, let's negotiate. Our minimum right now is $60k if you pay quickly.
Even $60k is way too much. It would force us to cancel programs and lay off staff who help kids.
Then tell me. What amount can your organization actually afford?
After talking to our board, the absolute maximum we can raise is $10k dollars from emergency appeals.
$10k is quite low for us. But since you're a charity, let's do a test first to build trust.
Thank you. We can send 3 sample files for decryption proof. Is that okay?
Yes. Upload them here. Maximum 10MB each, different file types please.
Uploading now.
I can't upload on this app.
Using gofile.io
Thanks. https://gofile.io/[redacted]
Files received. Wait a mins.
Decryption done. Here are your three files back, fully recovered and perfect.
Thank you so much. We opened them and everything looks correct. No damage at all.
Good proof. Because you're non-profit and cooperative, our special price now is $55k.
$55k is still very difficult. We're begging major donors just to reach anywhere close to that.
Honestly, the most we can realistically gather is 45,000 dollars without shutting down our core work.
45,000? That's pushing it very low after all this effort on our side.
Please understand. Every dollar we pay comes from people who donate to save lives. We have no more.
If you accept 45k, we promise to pay quickly and keep everything quiet. No police, no publicity.
...Alright. For charity reasons and fast payment, we accept 45,000 USD as final. We want only BTC.
Really? Thank you from the bottom of our hearts. We'll start preparing the Bitcoin right away.
Here's the wallet address: bc1q[redacted]
Got it. We're converting emergency funds now. It should take about 4 to 6 hours.
Okay. We've paused the publication timer for you. Please don't delay too long.
Update: we're halfway through buying the BTC. Compliance checks are slowing us a bit.
Should be ready in another 2 hours or so. Thank you for your patience.
No problem. Just send the transaction hash here when it's sent.
Transaction is sent now! Here's the link: https://mempool.space/tx/[redacted]
Watching the blockchain. First confirmation coming in...
Funds fully received and safe on our end.
Sending you the recovery package right now.
https://gofile.io/[redacted] You can find help.txt.
Downloaded everything safely. Testing on one isolated computer first.
Test successful! The sample files decrypted perfectly. No issues.
Excellent. You can now run it on the rest of your systems.
Starting the full decryption process on our main servers now.
10% complete already. Seems to be going smoothly.
Keep us posted if anything unusual happens.
100% complete! All files are back and readable. Huge relief.
Fantastic news. Congratulations on the recovery.
We can't thank you enough. Our programs can continue without interruption.
We're deleting all your exfiltrated data permanently now.
Deletion complete. No copies remain on our systems.
Is that really final? No chance of leaks later?
Yes, completely gone. We keep our word on this.
That's such a weight off our shoulders. Thank you again.
You're welcome. Business concluded.
Because of this, children will get food and medicine tomorrow.
Glad to hear it. Stay secure from now on.
We will. Take care. Goodbye.
Goodbye. Good luck with your mission.
